mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_id, e.name, e.email, e.phone, e.img_url, d.department_id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, p.position_id AS positionId, p.name AS positionName, ps.base_salary AS baseSalary, db.bonus AS bonus FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id LEFT JOIN position_salary ps ON e.position_id = ps.position_id LEFT JOIN department_bonus db ON e.department_id = db.department_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}
SELECT emp_id, DATE_FORMAT(in_time, '%H:%i') AS in_time, DATE_FORMAT(out_time, '%H:%i') AS out_time FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND DATE(in_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND DATE(in_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET in_time = NOW() WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND DATE(in_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (emp_id, in_time) VALUES (#{empId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET out_time = NOW() WHERE emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY in_time DESC LIMIT 1
